overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through an industrial district of Los Santos. The character proceeds along a sidewalk beside warehouse buildings, waits at a busy intersection for traffic to pass, throws an object, and continues across the street toward a bridge approach.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk next to a chain-link fence and concrete warehouse buildings

entered.detail: tall chain-link security fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
large concrete block industrial building with corrugated metal accents behind the fence
mature tree with thick trunk on the left side of the sidewalk
large metal lattice electrical transmission tower in the background
bright yellow fire hydrant near the corner intersection

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective walking along a narrow industrial sidewalk. A chain-link fence runs along the right side bordering a concrete warehouse, while a large tree stands on the left. In the background, power transmission towers rise against an overcast sky. The character approaches a street corner with a yellow fire hydrant visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy industrial intersection with multiple traffic lanes

events.description: reaches the street corner and stops to wait for passing traffic
red tanker truck passes by on the left side of the frame
black SUV and convertible sports car approach and stop at the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing traffic and waiting for an opportunity to cross

notable_agents.action: red tanker truck driving past the intersection from left to right
black SUV stopped at the intersection waiting for traffic signal

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signal lights at the intersection corner
large vertical billboard advertisement featuring a bottle
large cylindrical industrial storage tanks in the background
tall concrete bridge tower structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a wide industrial intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to an open street corner. Various vehicles including a red tanker truck and black SUV pass by or wait at the intersection. The scene features a yellow fire hydrant, traffic lights, and a large billboard, with industrial storage tanks and a bridge tower visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach with concrete barriers and industrial structures

events.description: character throws a small object with their right hand toward the street
begins crossing the street and continues walking along the bridge sidewalk

agents.ego_description: throwing an object and then crossing the street to continue along the bridge walkway

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking across the street from right to left

entered.detail: low concrete wall running along the right side of the walkway
small brown wooden shed or utility building

segments.scene_description: The character throws an object toward the street, then crosses the road while two pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The scene transitions to a bridge approach with concrete barriers on the right and industrial storage tanks on the left. The character walks toward a large bridge tower structure, passing a small wooden utility building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined industrial sidewalk into a wide-open intersection and toward a massive bridge structure. It begins by moving along a narrow path bordered by a chain-link fence and a concrete warehouse, passing a large tree under an overcast sky with power towers in the distance. As the camera reaches a street corner marked by a yellow fire hydrant, the view opens up to a busy intersection filled with passing vehicles, including a red tanker truck and a black SUV. The scene then shifts as the character throws an object into the street and crosses the road past oncoming pedestrians, moving away from the traffic lights and billboards. Finally, the perspective advances toward a large bridge tower, passing a small wooden utility building while flanked by concrete barriers and industrial storage tanks.
